mapper.select: SELECT * FROM supply_inventory WHERE shelter_id = #{shelterId} ORDER BY category, item_name
SELECT * FROM supply_inventory WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY item_name
SELECT * FROM supply_inventory WHERE shelter_id = #{shelterId} AND quantity <= min_threshold ORDER BY (quantity - min_threshold) ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM supply_inventory WHERE shelter_id = #{shelterId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM supply_inventory WHERE category = #{category}
mapper.update: UPDATE supply_inventory SET quantity = #{quantity}, last_updated = NOW() WHERE supply_id = #{supplyId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM supply_inventory WHERE item_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY category, item_name
SELECT * FROM supply_inventory WHERE shelter_id = #{shelterId} AND category = #{category} ORDER BY item_name
